action.reasoning: Observation: Eval has failed 12 times due to persistent container name conflict 'rab-claude-screenspot-pro-20260506-020602-eval'. The model is trained (2 epochs) and ready. I have 5 hours left and 11 iterations. Analysis: The container conflict is a persistent infrastructure issue at the framework level. I've been stuck retrying for many iterations. The error message says to remove the container with 'docker rm -f rab-claude-screenspot-pro-20260506-020602-eval'. Let me try running this command directly and then submit eval. Decision: Run the docker rm command and then submit eval.
action.command: echo 'Attempting to clear stuck container' && docker rm -f rab-claude-screenspot-pro-20260506-020602-eval 2>/dev/null || echo 'Container not found or already removed' && echo 'Done'
